questCraftDescription: An AI-powered engine for creating educational board games. Play a quest, or create your own!
urlPlaceholder: Paste Gist or raw JSON URL...
createNewQuestDescription: Use the AI-powered Quest Maker wizard.
readTheDocsDescription: Learn about QuestCraft, the schema, and more.
step1Description: Tell our AI game designer what your quest is about. Be descriptive for the best results, or click "Enhance" and let the AI help you!
ideaPlaceholder: e.g., A game about the challenges of being a freelance artist, balancing project deadlines, client satisfaction, and personal finances.
enhanceTooltip: Use AI to improve and expand your idea
scenariosPerLocationHint: 0-3. AI writes stories for properties. More takes longer.
groundInRealityHint: If checked, AI will use web search to generate scenarios from real-world events.
groundInRealityModelHint: For best results, select a model with web search in Settings (e.g., Google's 'gemini-2.5-flash' or OpenRouter's 'perplexity/llama-3-sonar-large-32k-online').
generateOutlineFirst: Generate an outline first to see refinement options.
jsonOutputPlaceholder: Your generated quest.json will appear here...
writingStoriesDescription: The AI will now write unique stories for each property on your board, one by one. This may take a few moments.
settingsDescription: Configure the application, manage your quests, and view data.
resetStatsDescription: Resets the token counter, cost estimate, and game timer displayed in the status bar.
resetStatsConfirmation: Are you sure you want to reset all usage statistics (tokens, cost, time)? This action cannot be undone.
auditLogCta: Review all prompts and responses sent to the AI provider.
resetAppDescription: Resetting will delete all saved custom quests, AI audit logs, and usage statistics from your browser.
resetAppConfirmation: Are you sure you want to reset the application? This will delete ALL custom quests, AI logs, and usage statistics from your browser. This action cannot be undone.
auditLogDescription: Logs of all requests to the AI provider. Most recent are at the top.
clearLogsConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete all AI audit logs? This cannot be undone.
noLogs: No logs yet. Generate a quest or a dynamic scenario to see logs here.
gameOverMessage: Congratulations, {winnerName}, you have won the quest!
aiPatience: This can take a moment, thank you for your patience.
choosePathDescription: This place has a story to tell. Do you want to experience the pre-written narrative, or use AI to generate a completely new, unpredictable event?
confirmEndGame: Are you sure you want to end the current game? All saved progress will be deleted.
playerModeDescription: Play pre-made quests or load custom games from your collection.
makerModeDescription: Create your own unique board games with the power of AI.
chatUnavailable: Chat is available with the Google Gemini and Community Gateway providers. Please select one in Settings to enable chat.
chatClearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the chat history? The AI's memory will also be reset.
chatWelcomeMaker: I'm your game design assistant. Ask me to refine your quest, suggest ideas, or explain schema fields!
chatWelcomeGame: I'm your game master for this quest. Ask me anything about the rules, the story, or for thematic advice!
chatWelcomeGeneral: I'm the QuestCraft AI assistant. How can I help you today?
aiRequestDelayHint: Delay between AI calls during scenario generation to avoid rate limits.
confirmDiscardOutline: Navigating back will discard your current quest outline. Are you sure?
confirmDiscardScenarios: Navigating back will discard your generated scenarios. You will need to regenerate them. Are you sure?
confirmStartOver: Are you sure you want to start over? Your entire quest draft will be lost.
apiKeyEnterManuallyTitle: Enter API Key for this Session
securityWarningBody: Keys entered here are stored in your browser's session storage and are less secure than environment variables. They will be cleared when you close this browser tab. Use for temporary testing or demos only.
apiKeyAck: I understand the security risks of storing an API key in the browser.
apiKeySavedForSession: API key saved for this session. Connection is being re-tested.
apiKeyRiskNotAcknowledged: You must acknowledge the security risk to save the API key.
apiKeyOverrideDescription: An API key is provided via a secure environment variable. You can enter a key here to temporarily override it for this session.
apiKeyEnterDescription: No API key was found in the environment. Please enter a key below to enable AI features for this session.
tokenLimitExceededWarning: You have reached the limit for the shared API key. To continue, please provide your own key below.
changeModelTooltip: Click to change AI provider or model
step3DescPreview: The AI has generated stories for your quest. Review them, edit any text, and fix any broken links before finalizing.
communityProviderDescription: Uses a free, shared backend powered by open-source models. Rate-limited and suitable for testing purposes. No API key needed.
welcomeScreenLead: Welcome to QuestCraft, an AI-powered board game engine. Play a pre-made quest, load your own, or use the AI wizard to create a new one from just an idea.
welcomeScreenLeadLink: Learn more about how it works.
someScenariosFailed: Some scenarios failed to generate. You can retry them or proceed without them.
